name: @dotdotgod/codex
description: Codex adapter for dotdotgod project memory workflows.

scripts.verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const req=['.codex-plugin/plugin.json','skills/project-load/SKILL.md','skills/doc-first-planning/SKILL.md','skills/project-initializer/SKILL.md','skills/project-initializer/scripts/init_project.sh','hooks/README.md']; JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.codex-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); for (const f of req) { if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('missing '+f); } console.log('codex adapter ok')"
